title: RESIDUAL (primary rung SHIPPED): runner-level defense-in-depth for any POST-DELIVERY transport error NOT surfaced as the ctx-cancel -1 the engine now catches
summary: PRIMARY RUNG RESOLVED 2026-07-16 (engine fix, branch fix/deliverable-authority-ctxcancel-859): cycle-859's false-FAIL was root-caused to exec.CommandContext SIGKILLing the driver on a completion-wait cancel -> Go ExitCode()=-1 -> engine mapped -1 to a PLAIN error -> runner substantive-error door (runner.go:680) hard-FAILed a green-ACS PASS (acs verdict=PASS red_count=0, valid sentinel, matched token, enforce-verify OK) WITHOUT consulting disk. Fix classifies `code==-1 && ctx.Err()!=nil` as ErrTransientBridgeFailure at the engine (engine.go, where the exit code is born) -> routes to the EXISTING reconcile door -> deliverable wins. Single-source (extends IsInfraTeardownError's domain, no runner predicate duplication); covers headless too (both route through execRunner). Anti-gaming intact: -1 with a LIVE ctx stays plain (start/launch failure, fail loud); 127 stays plain; reconcile still requires token-matched enforce-verify. RESIDUAL (this item, low): a hypothetical post-delivery transport termination that surfaces as a non-(-1), non-teardown exit code (some other signal, or a driver returning a stray >0 code AFTER writing a valid deliverable) would still hit the substantive door. No such rung is observed today; keep as defense-in-depth to revisit only if telemetry shows a non-(-1) post-delivery false-FAIL. If pursued: a single core.IsPostDeliveryTransportError predicate the substantive door also consults, gated by verifyReconcileDeliverable well-formedness + token match -- but do NOT duplicate the teardown classification the engine already owns.
acceptance: telemetry gate: scan post-fix runs for any FAIL where audit-report.md is well-formed PASS + acs-verdict.json green but the bridge error was non-(-1) non-teardown; close as not-observed if none

if observed: substantive-error door consults verifyReconcileDeliverable for the specific post-delivery code, RED test driving the exact shape; anti-gaming boundary (launch/boot/safety/cost/127) pinned unchanged
existing reconcile suites stay green; both reviewers
connects_to: completion-contract-cancel-parity (stdout/git contracts driver-level twin -- still 0.3, telemetry-gated)
source: cycle-854 retrospective (2026-07-16) -- primary rung shipped as the engine ctx-cancel -1 fix; this is the downgraded defense-in-depth residual. See memory project_deliverable_authority_ctxcancel_859_2026-07-16.
